title: Avatar generating method and related portable digital gaming console
abstract: According to a first aspect of the invention there is provided a computer-implemented method of generating an avatar based on a user's likeness, for use on a virtual world digital platform in which the user wishes to participate. The method comprises receiving, by at least one processor, a digital photograph of the user; creating, by at least one processor, an avatar using the digital photograph of the user, so as to create an avatar based on the user's likeness; and sending, by at least one processor, the avatar to the virtual world digital platform in which the user wishes to participate. In an embodiment, the method comprises storing, by at least one processor, the user's created avatar in a memory device.
claims:
Claims 1. A computer-implemented method of generating an avatar based on a user芒聙聶s likeness, for use on a virtual world digital platform in which the user wishes to participate, the method comprising: receiving, by at least one processor, a digital photograph of the user; creating, by at least one processor, an avatar using the digital photograph of the user, so as to create an avatar based on the user芒聙聶s likeness; and sending, by at least one processor, the avatar to the virtual world digital platform in which the user wishes to participate. 2. The computer-implemented method of claim 1 , wherein the method comprises storing, by at least one processor, the user芒聙聶s created avatar in a memory device. 3. The computer-implemented method of claim 2, wherein the method comprises receiving a request, by at least one processor, from the virtual world digital platform for the latest version of the user芒聙聶s avatar, extracting, by at least one processor, the most recent avatar from the memory device, and transmitting, by at least one processor, the most recent avatar to the virtual world digital platform. 4. The computer-implemented method of claim 3, wherein the method comprises determining, by at least one processor, the format of the avatar required by the virtual world digital platform in which the user wishes to participate, and customizing, by at least one processor, the avatar to suit the format required by the virtual digital world platform. 5. The computer-implemented method of claim 1 , wherein the method comprises allowing, by at least one processor, the user to customize his/her avatar, 

 including changing the gender and/or the weight and/or height and/or complexion of the avatar. 6 The computer-implemented method of claim 5, wherein the method further comprises allowing, by at least one processor, the user to use his/her own voice and/or immediate environment, within the virtual world digital platform. 7. A system for generating an avatar based on a user芒聙聶s likeness, for use on a virtual world digital platform in which the user wishes to participate, the system comprising: at least one processor; and a memory device containing instructions which when executed cause the processor to: receive a digital photograph of the user; create an avatar using the digital photograph of the user, so as to create an avatar based on the user芒聙聶s likeness; and send the avatar to the virtual world digital platform in which the user wishes to participate. 8. A portable digital gaming console comprising: memory to store a digital game; processor connected to the memory to manage and control the playing of the game; and a wireless communications module to connect the console to a gamer芒聙聶s playing device, which can be used to take and send a photograph of 

 the gamer to the gaming console, via the wireless communications module, for use by the digital game. 9. The portable digital gaming console of claim 8, wherein the gamer芒聙聶s playing device includes a computing device, and is used by the gamer to play the digital game stored on the gaming console. 10. The portable digital gaming console of claim 8, wherein upon initiation of the digital game, the processor sends a prompt to the gamer芒聙聶s playing device to request the gamer to take a photograph of him/herself, for use by the digital game. 1 1. The portable digital gaming console of claim 8, wherein the gaming console includes an avatar generation module to enable the gamer to create their avatar. 12. The portable digital gaming console of claim 1 1 , wherein the avatar generation module is arranged to prompt the gamer to complete a questionnaire designed to improve the gamer芒聙聶s personal gaming experience. 13. The portable digital gaming console of claim 1 1 , wherein the avatar generation module allows the gamer to customize his/her avatar, including changing the gender and/or the weight and/or height and/or complexion of the avatars. 14. The portable digital gaming console of claim 1 1 , wherein the avatar generation module allows the gamer to use his/her own voice and/or immediate environment, within the digital game. 15. A method of operating a portable digital gaming console, the method comprising: detecting a communications link between the gaming console and a gamer芒聙聶s playing device; 

 prompting the gamer to take a photograph of him/herself; sending the photograph to the gaming console using the communications link; and allowing the gamer to create an avatar, using the photograph, for use by the gamer within a digital game provided by the gaming console. 16. The method of claim 15, the method comprises using the gamer芒聙聶s playing device to play the digital game. 17. The method of claim 15, the method comprises using the gaming console to create the avatar. 18. The method of claim 15, the method comprising prompting the gamer to complete a questionnaire designed to improve the gamer芒聙聶s personal gaming experience. 19. The method of claim 15, the method comprising allowing the gamer to customize his/her avatar, including changing the gender and/or the weight and/or height and/or complexion of the avatars. 20. The method of claim 19, the method comprising allowing the gamer to use his/her own voice and/or immediate environment, within the digital game.
